name: pbc-omg-marine-cloud
description: Premier Boating Centers and Ocean Marine Group marine cloud platform monorepo

scripts.dev: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run build -w @marine-cloud/database && concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @marine-cloud/web" "npm run dev -w @marine-cloud/api"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @marine-cloud/database && npm run build -w @marine-cloud/api && npm run build -w @marine-cloud/web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.setup:db: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
